Empty state gallery

Twelve patterns for when there's nothing to show yet. Copy paired with a clear primary action.

No projects yet

Get started by creating your first project.

Create project

No results

We couldn't find anything matching your search. Try a shorter query or different keywords.

Clear filters

Inbox is clear

You're caught up. Take a breath.

No members

Invite teammates to collaborate on this workspace.

Invite teammates

No favourites yet

Star items to keep them handy. They'll appear here.

No messages

Reach out to your first contact to start a thread.

New message

No files uploaded

Drag and drop files, or select from your device.

Upload files

Nothing scheduled

Create your first event to see it on the calendar.

Add event

No activity

When teammates make changes, you'll see them here.

Permission denied

You don't have access to this resource. Ask a workspace admin to add you.

Request access

Break time

You've cleared all your tasks for today. Time for a coffee.

No comments

Be the first to leave a comment on this thread.

Start the conversation
